ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Byram appeared by telephone for Maya Morishita (Executor).

Ms. Byram stated that they had some issues with the case, that there was a dispute among the Remainder Beneficiaries as to which assets should be in probate, that they reached a settlement, that the settlement agreement was signed by one of the Brothers on Friday and that she is hoping to receive a signature from the other Brother shortly. Ms. Byram also stated that the inventory went to the Referee on early May, that additional information was provided to the Referee last month and that is hoping to receive it back. Status on close of estate is continued to August 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that an inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration must be filed by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
